Description
org.jscience.social.history.clock
Provides the org.jscience.social.history.time module.

  • Uses of Clock in org.jscience.social.history.clock

    Subclasses of Clock in org.jscience.social.history.clock
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    AlarmClock
    An abstract alarm clock that triggers an action when a specified target time is reached.
    class 
    BasicClock
    A basic clock implementation using standard ModernTime.
    class 
    ChronometerClock
    A chronometer (stopwatch) implementation that measures elapsed time.
    class 
    CountdownClock
    A clock that counts down from a target duration.
